use_cases: Displaying user skills or expertise areas in a profile
Filtering and organizing items with tag-based UI
Creating skill indicators for resumes or portfolios
Adding metadata labels to content cards
ai_summary: A flexible badge component with multiple variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying skill tags, metadata labels, and categorical indicators. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and includes hover interaction states. Used to create expandable skill tag interfaces for showcasing user expertise or organizing content.
